{{Infobox character
| name = Jek'nan
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|the Flourishing Disease}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Jek'nan, also known as the [[Flourishing Disease]], is a [[Fiend]] that has resided within a [[Pioneer world]] since the onset of the [[Abidan Collapse]]. He operates by spreading influence through various means, such as instigating rebellions, releasing viruses, or fostering tyrants. To maintain his secrecy from the [[Abidan]] [[Hounds]], he hides his activities behind a facade of unlikely coincidences. He utilizes an extensive underground network of roots that exists beneath reality to facilitate his movements and thoughts. His true form is a mass of multicolored, ribbon-like branches that can blend into the fabric of a world. While he has no firsthand history with the [[Abidan]], he possesses knowledge gained from consuming planetary fragments and through mental connections with other [[Fiends]]. Although he is powerful enough to match several [[Wolves]], he has experienced significant fear when encountering a black-armored Abidan. Despite the threat of being attacked, he believes that even if he is damaged in the Void, his [[essence]] can eventually regrow.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Known as the [[Flourishing Disease]], Jek'nan is a [[Fiend]] possessing branches and an ability to scream at frequencies imperceptible to technology. Having observed humans for centuries, this entity has already devoured thousands of them. Jek'nan is stronger than a single [[Wolf]] and can hold its own against a squad of four average [[Wolves]]. Driven by the intent to digest fragments of an [[Iteration]], the [[Fiend]] plans to strike as soon as the [[Way]] weakens.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] is a [[Fiend]] known as the [[Flourishing Disease]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] is stronger than the [[Wolf]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] is an even match for a squad of four average [[Wolves]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] intends to digest fragments of an [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] plans to strike the moment the [[Way]] weakens.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] screams in frequencies that technology cannot perceive.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] is a [[Fiend]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] has branches.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek'nan]] has observed humans for centuries and devoured thousands.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
